New stuff today - Super Bowl Sunday 2026

February 7, 2026  ·  #blog

Personal updates

It super cold. There is a sport-stravaganza going on - Winter Olympics in Italy. Carolina vs Duke (with all time thriller ending) and the SuperBowl (Seahawks vs Pats). I've got lots going on and still loving the 11ty - especially after watching this video, which really does show the simplicity of the software [That being said there are a few founddational knowledges that must be mastered in order to feel comfortable. Which is a much lighter weight task than learning React or Next or something. I finally learned enough React by learning Astro, but this 11ty feels back to my roots with plain HTML. It's fun]
